merchant.title: Merchant
merchant.entriesEmptySubtitle: Numbers will appear here as your customers pay.
merchant.prizesSubtitle: Cash credited to your SuperQi wallet.
merchant.prizesEmptySubtitle: Stay eligible — your first merchant win is around the corner.

consent.shariaIntro: FAWZ is a commercial rewards programme — not a lottery and not gambling.
consent.shariaBody1: Every Fawz number is earned through your spending on SuperQi. You don't pay anything extra to participate.
consent.shariaBody2: Cash prizes are funded by FAWZ as a thank-you for choosing digital payments.
consent.shariaPoint1: No fee is required to enter or play.
consent.shariaPoint3: Prizes are paid by FAWZ, not pooled from participants.
consent.mediaSubtitle: Help FAWZ celebrate your win on Al Rabiaa TV.
consent.mediaNotConditional: Your prize is paid regardless of your answer. Consent is fully optional.
consent.mediaBody: If you agree, FAWZ may use your first name and partial winning number on the live broadcast and social channels.
consent.mediaPoint1: Only first name + partial number are used — never full name or contact info.
consent.mediaPoint2: You can change your answer anytime from your profile.
consent.mediaPoint3: Footage stays archived for compliance auditing.
consent.mediaAgree: Yes — share my win on TV

home.jackpotSubtitle: Jackpot for this week's live draw
